top_signals.title: Amazon's Zoox issues software recall after robotaxi drove into heavy smoke
top_signals.summary: Last month, an unoccupied Zoox robotaxi drove into an active emergency fire scene that was clouded with smoke, the company said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Samsung Biologics makes $1.8 billion all-cash offer for Switzerland's PolyPeptide Group
top_signals.summary: South Korea's Samsung Biologics said on Monday that it had made an all-cash bid of 1.46 billion Swiss francs ($1.8 billion) for Switzerland's PolyPeptide Group.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
